div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Bolivia (Feely)
div.p:
14. Your 45, May 11, 9 p.m. Argentine Ambassador made it clear that any cooperation of Argentina in the Nine Power conference depends upon nature of Bolivian reply. He said if reply unsatisfactory
Argentina will break off diplomatic relations with Bolivia. If reply is satisfactory Argentina will attend the conference. Bolivia suggested to the Neutrals conference of the nine countries and the matter now apparently rests with Bolivia whether such a conference is to be held or not.
